add_subdirectory(c)

file(GLOB PY_TEST_FILES [0-9][0-9]-*.py)
file(GLOB PY_PERSIST_TEST_FILES 15-*.py)

list(APPEND PY_TEST_FILES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/msg_sequence_test.py")

set(PERSIST_LIST
)

if(WITH_PLUGIN_PERSIST_SQLITE)
    list(APPEND PERSIST_LIST persist_sqlite)
endif()

set(EXCLUDE_LIST
    01-connect-uname-password-success-no-tls
    03-publish-qos1-queued-bytes
    03-publish-qos2-max-inflight-exceeded
    09-extended-auth-single2
    # Not a test
    06-bridge-clean-session-core
)

foreach(PY_PERSIST_TEST_FILE ${PY_PERSIST_TEST_FILES})
    get_filename_component(PY_PERSIST_TEST_NAME ${PY_PERSIST_TEST_FILE} NAME_WE)
    list(APPEND EXCLUDE_LIST ${PY_PERSIST_TEST_NAME})
endforeach()

set(PREFIX "broker-")
get_test_files(PY_TEST_FILES "${EXCLUDE_LIST}" PY_TEST_NAMES)

add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "01-bad-initial-packets.py")

add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-cipher.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-common-name-failure.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-common-name-success.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-require-cert-failure.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-require-cert-success.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-require-tls-failure.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-ssl-require-tls-success.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-unix.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "21-proxy-v2-websockets.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 2 "22-http-api-acl.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 3 "22-http-api-api.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 2 "22-http-api-auth.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 2 "22-http-api-file.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 2 "22-http-api-tls.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "23-security-acl-file-reload.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "23-security-password-file-reload.py")
add_python_test(PY_TEST_NAMES ${PREFIX} 1 "msg_sequence_test.py")

check_for_missing_tests(PY_TEST_NAMES)

foreach(PERSIST_TYPE ${PERSIST_LIST})
    foreach(PY_TEST_FILE ${PY_PERSIST_TEST_FILES})
        get_filename_component(PY_TEST_NAME ${PY_TEST_FILE} NAME_WE)
        set(test_name "broker-${PY_TEST_NAME}-${PERSIST_TYPE}")
        add_test(NAME ${test_name}
            COMMAND python3 ${PY_TEST_FILE} ${PERSIST_TYPE}
        )
        mosq_set_test_props(${test_name})
        set_tests_properties(${test_name}
            PROPERTIES
                RESOURCE_GROUPS "ports:1,ports:1"
        )
    endforeach()
endforeach()
